_comment: 4-tier ladder + Fusion meta-entry per decisions/2026-04-25-q2-real-cultures-direction-ratified.md (Reversibility Hard) and decisions/2026-04-26-prototype-reshape-plan.md (Accepted 2026-04-29). T1 swarm / T2 mainline / T3 elite / T4 Demigod via within-civ tower merge (T1+T1 -> T2; T2+T2 -> T3; T3 -> T4 via Tribute upgrade). Fusion is NOT a tier — it is the endgame event consuming 2 T4 Demigods of the same civ into 1 God board slot, costing 1 Divinity per execution. C1 lands tiers.json alongside the legacy ages.json (still feeds the running 11-age UI loop) per the alongside-and-non-breaking pattern; ages.json is dismantled at C3->C4 alongside the age-loop UI rewrite, then deleted at C6 dead-code pass. All numbers [PROPOSAL]. Port target: Godot 4 Resource array (res://data/tiers/*.tres).

tiers.label: T1 Swarm
tiers.lore: The recruit line. Cheap, plentiful, dies fast. Every civilization starts here.

tiers.label: T2 Mainline
tiers.lore: The professional line. Doctrine and drill. The bulk of any standing force.

tiers.label: T3 Elite
tiers.mergePath: T3 -> T4 via Tribute upgrade (within-civ; no merge, direct promotion)
tiers.lore: The named line. A Spartan who is also a name, a jaguar warrior who is also a champion.

tiers.label: T4 Demigod / Hero
tiers.mergePath: Two T4 Demigods of the same civ -> 1 God via Fusion (1 Divinity)
tiers.lore: The mythic line. Achilles, Beowulf, Nanahuatzin. The match's high-water mark before the Fusion endgame.

fusion.label: Fusion
fusion.consumes: 2 T4 Demigods of the same civ
fusion.lore: The trailer beat. Two named demigods consumed into one God slot. The match's endgame catharsis.
